intro.title: THE ELVEN EXODUS
text: The ancient trees that sheltered your people for millennia now wither and rot.
The High Council refuses to acknowledge the truth, clinging to tradition.
But ten elders have chosen to defy them.
They will lead their loyal followers on a desperate exodus—
1600 leagues through hostile lands to Silverwood Vale,
a hidden sanctuary where the old magic still flows.
You must choose four elders to lead this migration.
Their skills, their followers, and their courage will determine
whether your people survive... or perish in the wilderness.

all_dead: The last of your followers falls to the ground.
Your elders stand alone in the wilderness,
surrounded by the graves of those who trusted them.
The dream of Silverwood Vale dies here.
starvation: With no food left, your people grow weak.
One by one, they collapse from hunger.
The elders can only watch as their followers perish.
The exodus ends not with battle, but with empty bellies.

reached_vale: After {days} days of hardship, you see it—
Silverwood Vale, nestled between ancient mountains.
The trees here are vibrant, untouched by the curse.
Magic flows through the air like music.
Your {followers} remaining followers weep with joy.
The elders have led them to salvation.
A new chapter begins for the elven people.

warnings.low_food: ⚠️ Food supplies are critically low! Your followers will starve soon.
warnings.low_followers: ⚠️ Your group is dangerously small. One more disaster could end the exodus.
warnings.low_gold: ⚠️ You have little gold left for emergencies.
warnings.no_medicine: ⚠️ You have no medicine. Disease could devastate your group.
